exercises.name: Plate Loaded Bench Press
exercises.notes: Hold. Last set RPE 9 at 72kg — only add weight when last set is RPE<=7. Aim clean 5s, no grind.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Hold weight, push reps 10 -> 12. Last was 10 @ RPE 8. Earn 2.5kg jump by hitting 12 across all sets.

exercises.name: Leg Press 45
exercises.notes: Hold weight (last RPE 9). Add reps 10 -> 12. Partial ROM, knee-friendly.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Hold — last 12 @ RPE 10 (maxed). Match reps at lower RPE before going up.

exercises.name: Reverse Curl
exercises.notes: Hold 26kg. Faded 12->10->10 last time, so target a solid 10 across all 3 sets.

exercises.name: Pec Deck Fly (drop set)
exercises.notes: ONE triple-drop, no rest: 45 to failure -> drop ~32kg to failure -> drop ~24kg to failure. Bumped first drop 40->45 (got 14 reps last time = too light, should fail at 8-12).

session_notes: Cut phase — retention, not PRs. Holding most lifts is a win. Lower-back caution: keep Cable Crunch controlled, no ballistic movement.
